items.title:
[正面] [h2]TLDR[/h2] 
If you're looking for a gacha inspi...
items.summary:
[h2]TLDR[/h2] 
If you're looking for a gacha inspired Slay the Spire but with a unique twist, this is a special game. 

[h3]Pros:[/h3]
[list]
[*]Dynamic and addictive game play based on character unlocks. Especially if you like card games (i.e. STS and Monster Train).
[*]Each character is playable in their own way (even the starter ones). Though some are noticeably stronger than others.
[*]The design of chars' kits create really compelling game play.
[*]Generous currency giveaway and pity system. If you're patient, you'll be able to get a decent roster and then some!
[*]Great 'assist' system makes it so that you can 'borrow' a char from others for missions, so you feel less a gap from other players and can try the stronger characters out.
[*]Beautiful art and design of characters. If you're into anime, some of the characters are quite unique and grow on you.
[*]Dark story which is OK in some parts and in other parts memorable. 
[*]Game is a labor of love with some funny Easter eggs .
[/list]

[h3]Cons:[/h3]
[list]
[*]The  current MTL from Chinese to English is OK and playable. But can hinder game play as it is not perfect.
[*]UX/UI is decent but stands improvement. Some important actions in the UI are not clear (e.g. leveling your character); the menus are a bit all over the place and could use a clean up in terms of the organization. 
[*]A lot of currencies and crafting items which muddies what to use for what purpose and which to prioritize for which missions. 
[*]The above cons make learning the learning curve of the game rather steep. Thankfully there is a Discord channel, but still.
[*]I can see the game play getting a little repetitive in terms of the activities and events, but it is my first week+ and I've played alot.
[*]Find buying currency is quite expensive than earning it. I did buy to support the developers though. 
[/list]

[h3]Overall:[/h3] 
Would recommend if you're looking for a STS gacha style card game to sink some time into! :)

items.title: [正面] I absolutely adore this game, it has so much perso...
items.summary: I absolutely adore this game, it has so much personality and so far Ive yet to hit a hard wall where there is no way to progress, if ya think ya did switch up your team to better appease Challenge. the characters are so fun to learn about as I slowly upgrade them and unlock new Alimens learning how they ended up at the University and learning just how VAST the world is outside of it, and how dark it all is. I also appreciate the 4 unique ways to play though Some are really rough  Like I Still cant master using the tentacles, It feels like a style that NEEDS a full team to make it work well, there is one exception to my experience of just addapt, theres 2 exceptions... and thats some challenges that claim to be lvl 20 but curbstomp even lvl 40 parties lol... also traphase I both LOVE and absolutely LOATH it, switching up abilities and forcing me to rethink builds constantly and then ya hit whales with SUPER toxic pvp builds. like my favorite is 2 heals and 2 denials. nothing like being stunlocked and having cards that CAN make a difference deleted while seeing my damage just UNDONE in seconds. like I dont mind losing cause it means I need to rethink my strats, but when I see such builds I have to TRY not to just immedately surrender cause I know for a fact 9/10 Times lest the cards favor me or they fumble their combos Im dead before I try XD overal, a very free player friendly game that if I ever get a new job I intend to throw some money as a thx! 8.5/10

items.title:
[正面] 게임이름 망각전야,morimens

장점 : 슬더스라이크 게임으로 게임성 자체는 충분함. ...
items.summary:
게임이름 망각전야,morimens

장점 : 슬더스라이크 게임으로 게임성 자체는 충분함. 
갠적으로 러브크래프트 세계관의 컨셉을 잘 녹여낸 4가지의 경계컨셉이 정말 재밌음. 
연타, 반격, 출혈, 독, 치명타 등 슬더스 자체 기본 컨셉도 충분히 다듬어져있음.
게임성 goat임 ㄹㅇ 해보셈. 스토리도 무난함

단점: 
1. 난이도가 계단 형식임. 
레벨이 두가지로 분류됨.(각성체레벨과 조사레벨)
각성체 레벨은 올리기 쉬움, 조사레벨은 일퀘나 스토리 밀면서 올려야 하는데 드럽게 안올라감.

문제는 강화나 각성체 스킬레벨 올리는 등의 육성컨텐츠가 조사레벨을 따라가고, 
몬스터 난이도 설계도 적정레벨의 모든 강화컨텐츠를 어느정도 완수했을때로 설계했음.

=> 예시 (챕터 4 적정레벨 35, 내 각성체 레벨 40, 내 조사레벨 20) 이러면 조사레벨 25나 35에 열리는 강화 컨텐츠 없어서 성장밀리고 잡몹한테도 뚜드려맞음.
=> 해결법 그냥 마음편히 하루하루 천천히 일퀘하면서 깨면됨. 켠왕 절대 불가

2. 번역 
와우 

기타등등
모바일로 먼저 출시된 게임임, 홍콩 플레이스토어나 대만 스토어에서 다운 받아서 할 수 있음(국내 출시x),스팀 계정 연동가능, 공식 디코방도 있음.
